name: Titanium Water Bottle
description: A lightweight titanium water bottle designed for hikers and trail runners. Holds 750 ml and keeps liquids cold for eight hours.

name: Solar LED Lantern
description: Rechargeable solar-powered LED lantern with a built-in USB port. Provides up to twelve hours of continuous illumination per charge.

name: Merino Wool Beanie
description: Soft merino wool beanie suitable for cold weather activities. Machine washable and available in six neutral colours.

name: Carbon Fibre Trekking Poles
description: Collapsible carbon fibre trekking poles with ergonomic cork handles. Adjustable from 60 cm to 130 cm and weighing only 180 grams each.

name: Waterproof Trail Shoes
description: Gore-Tex waterproof trail shoes with a Vibram outsole for maximum grip on wet and rocky terrain. Available in sizes 36 to 48.

name: Insulated Sleeping Bag
description: Three-season sleeping bag rated to minus ten degrees Celsius. Filled with 650-fill-power down and weighing 900 grams.

name: Portable Water Filter
description: Hollow-fibre membrane filter that removes 99.9999 percent of bacteria and protozoa. Filters up to 100 000 litres before replacement.

name: Headlamp Pro 500
description: Rechargeable headlamp delivering 500 lumens with a 100-metre beam. Features red night-vision mode and IPX6 waterproof rating.

name: Packable Rain Jacket
description: Ultra-packable 2.5-layer rain jacket that folds into its own chest pocket. Seam-sealed and weighing only 220 grams.

name: Satellite Communicator
description: Two-way satellite communicator with GPS tracking and SOS functionality. Compatible with all major satellite networks and weather forecast subscriptions.

name: Compression Dry Bag
description: Roll-top compression dry bag in 10-litre and 20-litre sizes. Constructed from 210D ripstop nylon with welded seams for complete waterproofing.

name: Multi-Tool Knife
description: Stainless steel multi-tool knife with fourteen functions including pliers, wire cutters, a file, and a bottle opener. Comes with a ballistic nylon sheath.
